common.noResultsFilters: No results for the current filters.

keys.hotkeyUnsupported: Unsupported key. Use a letter, digit, Space, or F1–F12 with at least Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or Windows.
keys.dictateHint: {{alt}} + {{space}} to dictate · hover an entry to copy or reinject
keys.dictateStartHint: Place the cursor in an app, then press {{alt}} + {{space}} to start.
keys.toggleDescription: Press {{alt}} + {{space}} to start, then press again to stop.
keys.pushToTalkDescription: Hold the shortcut while speaking, release to transcribe.
keys.activeCursorDescription: Text is inserted where the cursor is — Notepad, Word, browser…

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Settings are saved locally on this device.

general.label: General
general.description: Language, microphone, AI auto-edits, and correction learning.

models.label: Models
models.description: Whisper, LLM, and installed file management.

updates.label: Updates
updates.description: Installed version, manual check, and automatic updates.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: Launch at startup, power usage, and inference backend.

inputDevice.label: Microphone
inputDevice.hint: Changes apply on the next dictation.

autoEdit.label: AI auto-edits
autoEdit.descriptionOn: Cleans fillers, punctuation, and light rephrasing via a local model.
autoEdit.descriptionOff: Verbatim mode: raw transcription is injected without LLM post-processing.

autoLearn.label: Automatic correction learning
autoLearn.descriptionOn: Detects corrections in the target app and enriches the dictionary locally.
autoLearn.descriptionOff: Disabled: only manual corrections are applied.

autoUpdate.label: Automatic updates
autoUpdate.descriptionOn: Checks for new versions on GitHub at startup and downloads them in the background.
autoUpdate.descriptionOff: Disabled: no network check for application updates.

lowPower.label: Low power mode
lowPower.descriptionOn: LLM loaded on demand; Whisper unloaded after 10 min of inactivity.
lowPower.descriptionOff: Models kept in memory for lower latency.

adaptivePerf.label: Adaptive profiles
adaptivePerf.descriptionOn: Adjusts VAD chunk, STT threads, and "Automatic" models based on RAM/GPU.

modelsPanel.lowPowerDownloadHint: Downloading model file — in-memory load is deferred until dictation.

manage.deleteActiveHint: Switch to another model before removing the active one.

updatesPanel.devUnavailable: Updates are not available in development builds.
updatesPanel.alreadyChecking: An update check is already in progress.

settings.inferenceInfo: Built with {{compiled}} support — active backend: {{active}}. Profile {{tier}} — RAM {{totalRam}} GB ({{freeRam}} GB free). Effective models: Whisper {{whisper}}, LLM {{llm}}, VAD chunk {{chunk}}.

pipeline.firstLaunchHint: First launch: the model is loaded locally on your machine.

idle.label: Idle
idle.hint: Place the cursor in your app, then start dictation.

recording.label: Listening…
recording.hint: Speak clearly — press again to stop or release in push-to-talk mode.

transcribing.label: Transcribing…
transcribing.hint: Whisper transcribes your voice locally, with no network upload.

injecting.label: Injecting text…
injecting.hint: Text is inserted into the active application.

states.busyProcessing: Processing in progress — release the shortcut to cancel during transcription.

error.label: Error
error.hint: See the message below or start a new dictation.

correction.heading: Last dictation — edit to correct and enrich the dictionary
correction.placeholder: Your last dictation will appear here. Correct it to teach Whisper new words.

latency.title: Last dictation performance
latency.detail: STT {{sttMs}} ms · injection {{injectMs}} ms · LLM {{llmMs}} ms

welcome.title: Welcome to Calliop
welcome.subtitle: Dictate in any application, without the cloud.
welcome.continueWithoutModel: You can continue to test the microphone; dictation requires the model.

microphone.title: Allow microphone access
microphone.description: Calliop needs access to your microphone. Click "Test microphone" — Windows will prompt for permission on first recording.

practice.title: Try a dictation
practice.instructions: Press your shortcut to start, speak, then press again to stop.
practice.hintFocus: Keep the cursor in the field below.
practice.hintHotkey: Use the global shortcut — there is no in-app start button.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: Calliop works in any application where you can type.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Words and proper nouns injected into the Whisper prompt to improve transcription.
dictionary.empty: No words saved. Add proper nouns or correct a dictation from the home screen.

modal.createDescription: Add a word or proper noun injected into the Whisper prompt to improve transcription.
modal.editDescription: Edit the spelling or casing of the saved word.
modal.correctMisspellingHelp: When enabled, Calliop automatically replaces the incorrectly dictated form with the correct word.
modal.cannotEditMisspelling: The transcribed mistake cannot be edited. Delete and recreate the word to change the rule.

errors.alreadyExists: This word is already in the dictionary.

snippets.title: Snippets
snippets.subtitle: Define voice triggers that insert full text after transcription.
snippets.empty: No snippets saved. Create a voice trigger or import a JSON file.

modal.createDescription: Define a voice trigger and the text inserted after transcription.
modal.editDescription: Edit the trigger or inserted text.

variablesModal.title: Variables
variablesModal.description: Values resolved at dictation time. Copy a token to use it in a snippet.

style.title: Style
style.subtitle: Adapt dictation tone to the active app — formal for Outlook, casual for Slack, technical for your IDE. Active only with AI auto-edits enabled.
style.empty: No rules configured. Create an app → style mapping to personalize your dictations.

casual.label: Casual
casual.description: Natural, conversational tone for chat and notes.

formal.label: Formal
formal.description: Professional register for emails and documents.

technical.label: Technical
technical.description: Precision and concision for code and documentation.

activeWindow.label: Foreground application
activeWindow.notDetected: No application detected yet. Click in the target app (even on your other screen) — detection updates automatically.

modal.title: New style rule
modal.description: Associate an application with a dictation style. Applies when AI auto-edits are enabled.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Browse past dictations. Use actions on each entry to copy or reinject text into the active application.

insight.title: Statistics
insight.subtitle: Activity, pipeline performance, and per-app breakdown — computed locally from your history.

empty.title: No statistics yet
empty.description: Complete your first dictations to see activity, pipeline latency, per-app breakdown, and speaking speed.

lastLatency.label: Last dictation latency
lastLatency.empty: Complete a dictation to measure latency.

speechTime.label: Speaking time
speechTime.detail: Cumulative audio duration of your dictations.

activity.title: Activity — 7 days
activity.description: Words dictated per day. Dictation count appears above each bar.
activity.empty: Bars will appear after your first dictations.
activity.aria: Chart of words dictated over the last seven days

latency.title: Latency — recent dictations
latency.aria: Chart of latency for recent dictations

appUsage.title: Usage by application
appUsage.description: Breakdown of dictated words by active window.
appUsage.aria: Breakdown of dictated words by application

heatmap.title: Activity by hour and app
heatmap.description: Word volume over the last 7 days — darker cells mean more dictation in that hour.
heatmap.empty: The heatmap fills in as you dictate across different hours and apps.
heatmap.aria: Heatmap of dictation activity by hour and application over the last seven days

streak.label: Current streak
streak.currentDetail_one: {{count}} day in a row — keep it going.
streak.currentDetail_other: {{count}} days in a row — keep it going.
streak.empty: Dictate at least once per day to start a streak.

timeSaved.label: Estimated time saved
timeSaved.detail: vs typing the same words at {{baseline}} words/min.
timeSaved.empty: Time saved is estimated once you have dictation audio.
timeSaved.method: Speaking time subtracted from equivalent typing time (local estimate).

wpm.title: Speed vs typing
wpm.empty: Speed is calculated after your first dictations.
wpm.aria: Dictation speed: {{wpm}} words per minute, {{percent}} percent of average typing speed

errors.MIC_PROBE_ACTIVE_BEFORE_DICTATION: Stop the microphone test before dictating.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_AUTO_WHISPER: Cannot delete the automatic Whisper model.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE_WHISPER: Cannot delete the active Whisper model.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_AUTO_LLM: Cannot delete the automatic LLM model.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_ACTIVE_LLM: Cannot delete the active LLM model.
errors.LLM_ENGINE_LOAD_FAILED: The model preference was saved, but loading it failed (insufficient memory or LLM engine error). Try again or choose a lighter model.
errors.LLM_MODEL_CORRUPT: The model file is incomplete or corrupted. It was removed — select the model again to re-download it.
errors.WORD_TOO_LONG: Word cannot be empty and cannot consist of digits only.
errors.MISSPELLING_INVALID: Incorrect form cannot be empty and cannot consist of digits only.
errors.MISSPELLING_SAME_AS_WORD: Incorrect form must differ from the correct word.
errors.MISSPELLING_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This transcribed mistake is already registered.
errors.WORD_ALREADY_IN_DICTIONARY: This word is already in the dictionary.
errors.SNIPPET_TRIGGER_TOO_SHORT: Trigger must be at least 2 characters long.
errors.SNIPPET_IMPORT_NO_VALID: No valid snippets imported (trigger ≥ 2 characters, non-empty text).
errors.PATTERN_TOO_SHORT: Pattern must be at least 2 characters long.
errors.DICTATION_ACTIVE_BEFORE_MIC_PROBE: A dictation is in progress. Stop it before testing the microphone.
errors.INVALID_TONE: Invalid tone (default, casual, formal, or technical).

reasons.not_loaded: The AI model was not loaded. Text was cleaned without AI.
reasons.timeout: AI cleanup timed out. Post-processed text was injected.
reasons.validation_failed: AI response was invalid. Post-processed text was injected.
reasons.worker_error: The AI engine encountered an error. Post-processed text was injected.

appUpdate.title: Update {{version}} ready
appUpdate.description: The app keeps working normally. Install whenever you are ready.
